reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.26

Google Maps share links that only carry a place ID (Share > Copy link on a named business/place, rather than a dropped pin) now resolve automatically: an invisible WebView loads the link the same way a browser would, letting Google's own JS resolve the coordinates, instead of failing silently. Progress while pasting a location now shows a proper animated status (reading clipboard -> opening link -> looking up the place -> finding the address) instead of a bare spinner.
